commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a guarded manifest-contract reader for startup provider ownership checks and a regression test where an unreadable manifest coexists with a healthy Brave web search provider.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +115. Total +136 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main has direct manifest.contracts reads on the startup provider ownership path, and the PR body gives a focused bad-manifest repro; I did not run it in this read-only checkout.

target.title: fix(plugins): guard startup provider contracts
target.body:
## Summary
- guards startup provider contract reads so an unreadable manifest `contracts` property cannot abort provider startup planning
- reuses the installed-index contract snapshot when a healthy configured web search provider is selected
- adds regression coverage for a malformed manifest next to a healthy Brave provider

## Verification
- `node --import tsx - <<'EOF' ... EOF` bad-manifest repro returns `["brave"]`
- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/plugins/channel-plugin-ids.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/plugins/gateway-startup-plugin-ids.ts src/plugins/channel-plugin-ids.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

Behavior addressed: startup provider planning no longer crashes when one plugin manifest throws while reading provider contracts.
Real environment tested: local Codex worktree on macOS with repo symlinked dependencies; AWS Crabbox check pending.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: direct bad-manifest repro; focused Vitest file; oxlint on touched files; diff whitespace check; local autoreview.
Evidence after fix: repro returned `["brave"]`; focused suite passed 125 tests; oxlint and diff check passed; autoreview reported no actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: the healthy configured web search provider remains selected and the unreadable manifest is skipped.
What was not tested: full `pnpm check:changed` remote gate is pending and will be added after the Crabbox run completes.
target.author: vincentkoc
